data.raceComments: {"comment":"A big field will contest the BM80 Handicap over 1110m for 85K, and 12. FIRST MISSION will be at his peak fitness third up from a spell after finishing a game fourth here 2 weeks ago when weakening late off the front. The blinkers are off for the first time, and if Ryan Maloney can find a spot from a wide gate, then he should be among the hardest to beat. 15. FRAGILE LOVE did not have much luck when resuming at the Gold Coast 4 weeks ago, getting held up and pushed back at a vital stage. She still managed to finish fourth that day, and despite copping a nasty draw here, she is still an each-way chance. 1. RICHON has had his issues, and he ran boldly for second fresh up off a long spell at Ipswich just over 3 weeks ago. He will only continue to improve with racing, and at this level, he can go one better. 8. ESTRONDO is usually running on in his races, and he was runner-up off a genuine tempo here 2 weeks ago. If the gaps come at the right time, then he is always a top 4 chance.","runners":[12,15,1,8],"exclusive":true}
